name: gemini-research-mcp
description: AI-powered research using Gemini with FastMCP 3.1 BM25 tool search and Deep Research
long_description:
MCP server providing AI-powered research capabilities using Google Gemini with a FastMCP 3.1 BM25 tool-search surface:

- **research_web**: Fast web research with Gemini grounding (5-30 seconds)
- **research_deep**: Comprehensive autonomous research agent (3-20 minutes)
- **search_tools**: Discover utility tools for URL reading, templates, sessions, follow-up, resume, and export
- **call_tool**: Execute a discovered utility tool by name

Utility tools remain directly callable for clients that already know the tool name.

tools.name: research_web
tools.description: Fast web research with Gemini grounding (5-30 seconds). Use for fact-checking, current events, documentation.

tools.name: research_deep
tools.description: Comprehensive autonomous research agent (3-20 minutes). Use for research reports, competitive analysis, investigations.

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Search the server's utility tools with a natural-language query and return full tool definitions.

tools.name: call_tool
tools.description: Execute a utility tool discovered through search_tools by providing its name and arguments.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API Key
gemini_api_key.description: Your Google Gemini API key (get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey)
